payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular center panel, visible vertical wood grain and low sheen; the full door is visible (not cropped) in the image, and the camera appears to be approximately 1.5 m away.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"tall dark wood cabinet door","long_description":"Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular center panel, visible vertical wood grain and low sheen; the full door is visible (not cropped) in the image, and the camera appears to be approximately 1.5 m away.","attributes":["dark brown stain","wood grain visible","single recessed center panel","vertical rectangular shape","matte/low sheen finish","full-view (not edge-cropped)","narrow/tall proportions"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
